'''JAK Racing''' was the manufacturer of the [[J930 Dash-8 engine|J930 ''Dash-8'']] [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] engine. The engines were known for their excellent traction, which made the engines useful for racing on all kinds of terrain. The [[Triffian/Legends|Triffian]] [[Ebe E. Endocott/Legends|Ebe E. Endocott]] used a JAK Racing [[Ebe Endocott's Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] during the race event known as the [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] that was set in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. The [[Devlikk/Legends|Devlikk]] [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracer]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Raido]] also utilized ''Dash-8'' engines during [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] while racing on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Mon Gazza/Legends|Mon Gazza]].
